https://blog.bitmex.com/instrumentID-ass.title: API Update: Introducing the 'instrumentID' and 'assetID' Fields to the Instrument and Wallet Assets Endpoints
https://blog.bitmex.com/instrumentID-ass.content:
API Update: Introducing the 'instrumentID' and 'assetID' Fields to the Instrument and Wallet Assets Endpoints
Wed, 11 Mar 2026 16:00:00 GMT
https://blog.bitmex.com/instrumentID-asset-ID/
From 2 Mar 2026, new fields, instrumentID and assetID, will be added to the BitMEX Instruments and Wallet Assets endpoints respectively.

BitMEX expands its commodity offerings with the listing of the Silver (XAG) Perpetual Swap. Traders can participate in the Gold VS Silver Campagin, featuring a 30,000 USDT prize pool.
